calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2019 Off Calendar

Request For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing ***Amended On 1/22/2019***
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Maria A. Viveros, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Vivian Lerche, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Maria A. Viveros, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint for collections/open book account was filed on June 29, 2017.
Substitute service of defendant Maria A. Viveros, an individual, took place on July 17, 2017, and was effectuated on July 17, 2017.
Default as to defendant Maria A. Viveros, an individual, was entered on January 30, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 21, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance a default prove-up hearing on February 21, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Maria A. Viveros, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,317.89.
Costs - $515.00.

Total - $30,832.89.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
